preview.summary: Portugal continue their Group K campaign against tournament debutants Uzbekistan, the first Central Asian nation to reach a World Cup. The European side are strong favourites, but Fabio Cannavaro's disciplined newcomers aim to make their historic bow count.
preview.homeForm: Portugal qualified comfortably atop UEFA Group F and rank 5th in the world among the pre-tournament favourites.
preview.awayForm: Uzbekistan qualified for a maiden World Cup and sit around 50th in the FIFA rankings, an emerging Asian force.
preview.homeKey: Cristiano Ronaldo, talisman leading Portugal at a sixth World Cup.
preview.awayKey: Eldor Shomurodov, experienced striker and Uzbekistan's biggest star.
storylines: Uzbekistan are the first Central Asian nation ever to reach a World Cup
2006 winner Fabio Cannavaro coaches the debutants
Man City's Abdukodir Khusanov anchors Uzbekistan's defence
preview.h2h: The nations have no prior competitive history, meeting for the first time.
